'''Nista''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Nista system/Legends|Nista system]]. It was located in the [[Cadriaan Province]] and was the base of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell, the [[Pelagia Freedom Force]].<ref name="LE" />

{{Planet-stub}}
